page_metadata.biotools__summary: This web server provides online access to realize a full workflow of building a Structure‑Activity/Property Relationship(SAR/SPR) model. It provides a browser-based pipelining which requires no programming skills.
page_metadata.bioschemas__summary: This web server provides online access to realize a full workflow of building a Structure‑Activity/Property Relationship(SAR/SPR) model. It provides a browser-based pipelining which requires no programming skills.
